news.t: Nicholas Wealth Launches BHDG To Target Bitcoin Downside Protection

overview.description: The Nicholas Bitcoin Tail ETF (BHDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund is an actively managed, providing indirect bitcoin exposure through an options-based strategy aiming to hedge against significant declines in the price of bitcoin and/or bitcoin-related investments. It seeks long-term capital appreciation.

holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

data.title: Nicholas Wealth Launches BHDG To Target Bitcoin Downside Protection
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $BHDG #Bitcoin--Nicholas Wealth launches BHDG ETF, an actively managed ETF using options to help manage Bitcoin downside risk and expand its XFUNDS lineup.
